doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_add1sp1n (mpfr/src/add1sp.c L256-L358): same-precision same-sign addition fast path for p == GMP_NUMB_BITS == 64 — single-limb mantissas with sh == 0 (TS mant directly equals the C 64-bit limb). Dispatcher routes here when all three operands have prec = 64. Case A (bx == cx): exact sum overflows 64 bits since both operands have MSB set; extract rb = (a0 wrapped) & 1, ap0 = HIGHBIT | (a0 wrapped >> 1), bx++. Case B (bx != cx, swap to bx > cx, set d = bx - cx > 0): B1 (d < 64) compute a0 = bp0 + (cp0 >> d) with possible 64-bit overflow, sb = cp0 << (64-d); if overflow then shift down by one and bump exp; else rb = sb >> 63, sb &= ~HIGHBIT. B2 (d >= 64): sb = (d != 64 || cp0 != HIGHBIT), rb = (d == 64), ap0 = bp0. Standard 5-mode rounding with sign-aware truncate/add-one-ulp; ternary reflects (rounded - exact) direction. Overflow on exp > emax delegated to mpfr_overflow.
c_signature: static int mpfr_add1sp1n(mpfr_ptr a, mpfr_srcptr b, mpfr_srcptr c, mpfr_rnd_t rnd_mode)
divergence_from_c: Static C linkage dropped (exercised via mpfr_add at prec == 64). C asserts prec == GMP_NUMB_BITS via MPFR_ASSERTD; TS throws MPFRError('EPREC') for any other prec. C 64-bit modular arithmetic mirrored in BigInt with explicit mod-2^64 masking. Result return shape replaces in-place mutation.
refs: mpfr/src/add1sp.c L256-L358 — verbatim C reference body.
mpfr/src/add1sp.c L1078-L1080 — dispatcher routing (when used; mpfr_add1sp1n is also routed from the small fast paths).
src/ops/sub1sp1n.ts — companion op (sub direction, same prec).
